project.name: PropManager Navigation Consolidation
project.description: Consolidate 20+ sidebar menu items into 8-9 hub entries following the Finance Hub pattern, reducing navigation scroll by ~55% and improving user experience across the landlord portal

qualityStandards.description: Consolidate navigation while preserving all existing functionality, deep linking, and badge counts. Follow the established Finance Hub architecture pattern.
principles: All existing routes must continue to work via redirects or aliases
Badge counts must aggregate correctly for hub entries
Tab state must persist in URL query params for deep linking
Async component loading with skeleton placeholders
No regression in page load performance
Mobile navigation must mirror desktop consolidation

feedbackLoops.description: Run ALL feedback loops before committing. Do NOT commit if any fail.

commands.typecheck: npm run build -- --mode development 2>&1 | grep -i error

hub_creation.description: Create new hub index components with tab routing

controller_consolidation.description: Create hub controllers that aggregate data for all tabs

route_migration.description: Add hub routes and redirects for backwards compatibility

tab_refactoring.description: Refactor existing pages into tab components

badge_aggregation.description: Aggregate badge counts per hub in middleware

items.title: Create Tenants Hub Index Component
items.description: Create the main Tenants Hub component with tab-based navigation for Directory, Onboarding, Verifications, Payment Verifications, Move-Outs, and History tabs. This consolidates 6 menu items into 1.
steps: Create Pages/Tenants/Hub.vue with tab navigation header
Define tabs array: directory, onboarding, verifications, payment-verifications, move-outs, history
Implement URL query param sync for tab state (?tab=directory)
Add async component loading with defineAsyncComponent for each tab
Create loading skeleton placeholders for async tab content
Ensure tab badges display individual counts (pending invitations, pending verifications, etc.)
items.verification: Navigate to /tenants, verify all 6 tabs load correctly with proper content

items.title: Create Maintenance Hub Index Component
items.description: Create Maintenance Hub component with tabs for Tickets and Complaints. Consolidates 2 menu items into 1.
steps: Create Pages/Maintenance/Hub.vue with tab navigation
Define tabs: tickets, complaints
Sync tab state to URL query params
Add async loading for each tab component
Display ticket count badge on Tickets tab
items.verification: Navigate to /maintenance, verify both tabs load correctly

items.title: Create Water Hub Index Component
items.description: Create Water Hub component with tabs for Readings, History, and Settings. Consolidates 3 conditional menu items into 1.
steps: Create Pages/Water/Hub.vue with tab navigation
Define tabs: readings, history, settings
Sync tab state to URL query params
Add async loading for each tab
Display readings badge on Readings tab
Ensure hub only appears when water_billing feature is enabled
items.verification: Navigate to /water with feature enabled, verify all 3 tabs work

items.title: Create Archive Hub Index Component
items.description: Create Archive Hub component with tabs for Documents, Leases, and Activity Logs. Consolidates 3 menu items into 1.
steps: Create Pages/Archive/Hub.vue with tab navigation
Define tabs: documents, leases, activity
Sync tab state to URL query params
Add async loading for each tab
No badges required for archive tabs
items.verification: Navigate to /archive, verify all 3 tabs load correctly

items.title: Create Operations Hub Index Component
items.description: Create Operations Hub component with tabs for Notifications, Bulk Operations, Team (Caretakers), and Imports. Consolidates 4 menu items into 1.
steps: Create Pages/Operations/Hub.vue with tab navigation
Define tabs: notifications, bulk, team, imports
Sync tab state to URL query params
Add async loading for each tab
Note: Notifications tab already has internal tabs - load as single component
items.verification: Navigate to /operations, verify all 4 tabs load correctly

items.title: Create TenantsHubController
items.description: Create controller that aggregates data for all Tenants Hub tabs, using lazy loading to only fetch data for the active tab.
steps: Create app/Http/Controllers/TenantsHubController.php
Add index() method that accepts tab query param
Use Inertia lazy() for conditional data loading per tab
Include tab-specific badge counts in response
Reuse existing query logic from TenantController, TenantInvitationController, VerificationController, PaymentVerificationController, MoveOutController
items.verification: Each tab only loads its own data, not all tabs' data

items.title: Create MaintenanceHubController
items.description: Create controller for Maintenance Hub with Tickets and Complaints tabs.
steps: Create app/Http/Controllers/MaintenanceHubController.php
Add index() method with tab-based lazy loading
Aggregate ticket count badge for hub
Reuse query logic from TicketController and ComplaintController
items.verification: Tab switching loads correct data without full page reload

items.title: Create WaterHubController
items.description: Create controller for Water Hub with Readings, History, and Settings tabs.
steps: Create app/Http/Controllers/WaterHubController.php
Add index() method with tab-based lazy loading
Include readings badge count
Add feature gate check for water_billing
Reuse query logic from WaterReadingController
items.verification: Hub only accessible when water_billing feature enabled

items.title: Create ArchiveHubController
items.description: Create controller for Archive Hub with Documents, Leases, and Activity Logs tabs.
steps: Create app/Http/Controllers/ArchiveHubController.php
Add index() method with tab-based lazy loading
Reuse query logic from DocumentController, LeaseController, ActivityLogController
items.verification: All archive data accessible via tabs

items.title: Create OperationsHubController
items.description: Create controller for Operations Hub with Notifications, Bulk Ops, Team, and Imports tabs.
steps: Create app/Http/Controllers/OperationsHubController.php
Add index() method with tab-based lazy loading
Reuse query logic from NotificationController, BulkController, InvitationController, ImportController
items.verification: All operations accessible via tabs

items.title: Add Hub Routes with Backwards-Compatible Redirects
items.description: Add new hub routes and redirect old routes to maintain backwards compatibility and bookmarks.
steps: Add GET /tenants route pointing to TenantsHubController@index with name tenants.hub
Add redirect from /tenant-invitations to /tenants?tab=onboarding
Add redirect from /verifications to /tenants?tab=verifications
Add redirect from /payment-verifications to /tenants?tab=payment-verifications
Add redirect from /move-outs to /tenants?tab=move-outs
Add GET /maintenance route pointing to MaintenanceHubController@index
Add redirect from /tickets to /maintenance?tab=tickets
Add redirect from /complaints to /maintenance?tab=complaints
Add GET /water route pointing to WaterHubController@index
Add redirects from /readings, /readings/history, /water/settings
Add GET /archive route pointing to ArchiveHubController@index
Add redirects from /documents, /leases, /activity-logs
Add GET /operations route pointing to OperationsHubController@index
Add redirects from /notifications, /bulk, /invitations, /imports
items.verification: All old URLs redirect correctly to new hub with proper tab selected

items.title: Update AuthenticatedLayout Landlord Navigation
items.description: Replace multiple menu items with single hub entries in the landlord navigation.
steps: Remove individual items: All Tenants, Invitations, Verifications, Payment Verifications, Move-Outs
Add single 'Tenants' hub entry with combined active state detection
Remove Issues and Complaints items
Add single 'Maintenance' hub entry
Remove Readings, History, Settings water items
Add single 'Water' hub entry (conditional)
Remove Documents, Lease Agreements, Tenant History, Activity Logs items
Add single 'Archive' hub entry
Remove Notifications, Bulk Operations, Caretakers items
Add single 'Operations' hub entry
Update badge logic to show aggregated counts per hub
Replicate changes in mobile sidebar section
items.verification: Sidebar shows 9 items instead of 20+, no scrolling required on standard viewport

items.title: Update HandleInertiaRequests Badge Aggregation
items.description: Aggregate badge counts for each hub in the Inertia middleware.
steps: Add 'tenants' badge that sums paymentVerifications + moveOuts counts
Add 'maintenance' badge that equals tickets count
Add 'water' badge that equals readings count
Optionally add 'operations' badge if notification counts are tracked
Update navBadges prop to include hub-level badges
items.verification: Hub entries show aggregated badge counts

items.title: Add Loading Skeletons for Tab Content
items.description: Create skeleton loaders for async tab content to improve perceived performance.
steps: Create resources/js/Components/TabSkeleton.vue with shimmer animation
Add table skeleton variant for list tabs
Add card skeleton variant for dashboard tabs
Use Suspense fallback in hub components for async tabs
items.verification: Skeleton displays during tab loading, smooth transition to content

items.title: Update Mobile Sidebar to Match Desktop

Test on mobile viewport sizes
items.verification: Mobile sidebar shows same 9 items as desktop

items.title: Update Ziggy Route Generation
items.description: Ensure JavaScript route() helper works with new hub routes.
steps: Run php artisan ziggy:generate to update routes
Verify route('tenants.hub'), route('maintenance.hub'), etc. work in Vue
Update any hardcoded route references in components
Test deep linking with tab params
items.verification: All route() calls work correctly with new hub routes
